name: songle
tagline: Professional Relay Solutions for Industrial and Automotive Applications
description: Songle Relay is a leading manufacturer of electromechanical relays, specializing in power relays, signal relays, automotive relays, and solid state relays. Founded in 1988, Songle provides reliable switching solutions for industrial control, home appliances, automotive electronics, and new energy applications.
longDescription: Songle Relay (Ningbo Songle Relay Co., Ltd.) is a world-renowned relay manufacturer with over 35 years of experience in electromechanical switching technology. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides access to Songle's comprehensive relay portfolio including power relays up to 40A, signal relays for PCB applications, automotive relays for vehicle electronics, and solid state relays for silent switching. Songle's products are widely used in industrial automation, home appliances, HVAC systems, smart homes, and new energy vehicles. With annual production exceeding 800 million units, Songle has established itself as one of the largest relay manufacturers globally, serving customers in more than 80 countries.

coreProducts.name: Power Relays
coreProducts.description: High-current electromechanical relays for industrial and appliance applications, with ratings up to 40A and various coil voltages.

coreProducts.name: Signal Relays
coreProducts.description: Compact PCB-mount relays for signal switching and low-power applications, available in various contact configurations.

coreProducts.name: Automotive Relays
coreProducts.description: Automotive-grade relays designed for vehicle electronics, featuring high reliability and compliance with automotive standards.

coreProducts.name: Solid State Relays
coreProducts.description: Semiconductor-based relays offering silent operation, long life, and fast switching for industrial control applications.

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: Control systems, PLCs, motor control, and industrial equipment requiring reliable switching solutions.

industries.name: Home Appliances
industries.description: Washing machines, refrigerators, air conditioners, and other household appliances.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Vehicle control systems, power distribution, lighting, and new energy vehicle applications.

industries.name: Smart Home
industries.description: Intelligent lighting control, security systems, and home automation devices.

industries.name: New Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, energy storage systems, charging piles, and renewable energy applications.

certifications.name: UL Certification
certifications.description: UL Recognized Component for North American Market

certifications.name: VDE Certification
certifications.description: German Safety Certification for European Market

certifications.name: CQC Certification
certifications.description: China Quality Certification for Domestic Market

seoTitle: Songle Relay Distributor | Power, Signal, Automotive Relays
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Songle relays. Power relays, signal relays, automotive relays, and solid state relays for industrial and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of Songle Relay?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of Songle Relay products. We provide genuine Songle relays with full factory warranty and technical support. Our partnership with Songle ensures customers receive authentic products directly from the manufacturer, avoiding counterfeit risks common in the relay market.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us to verify our distributor status and discuss your relay requirements.

faqs.question: What types of relays does Songle manufacture?
faqs.answer: Songle manufactures a comprehensive range of electromechanical and solid state relays including: Power Relays (10A-40A) for industrial and appliance applications, Signal Relays (1A-3A) for PCB mounting and low-power switching, Automotive Relays for vehicle electronics with high vibration resistance, and Solid State Relays for silent, long-life switching applications. Each type is available in various contact configurations (SPST, SPDT, DPDT) and coil voltages.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right relay type for your application.

faqs.question: What certifications do Songle relays have?
faqs.answer: Songle relays hold comprehensive international certifications including UL (North America), VDE (Europe), CQC (China), and TUV. Automotive relays meet IATF 16949 standards. These certifications ensure compliance with safety and quality requirements in major markets worldwide, making Songle relays suitable for export-oriented products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Check specific product datasheets for certification details relevant to your target markets.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Songle relays?
faqs.answer: Standard Songle relays typically ship within 2-4 weeks from our warehouse. For high-volume orders or specialized automotive relays, lead time may extend to 6-8 weeks. BeiLuo maintains strategic inventory of popular series including SRD, SLA, and SRA power relays for faster delivery. Contact our sales team for current stock status and lead times.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact sales for current lead times. Consider forecast agreements for high-volume needs.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Songle relay for my application?
faqs.answer: Relay selection involves several key parameters: Contact Rating (current and voltage your load requires), Coil Voltage (must match your control circuit), Contact Configuration (SPST, SPDT, etc.), Mounting Type (PCB, panel, or socket), and Environmental Requirements (temperature, vibration, sealing). Our FAE team can help analyze your specific requirements and recommend the optimal Songle relay from our extensive catalog.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application requirements for personalized relay selection assistance.
